evidence_requirement: SIEM logs of failed login attempts
implementation_guidance: Implement additional logging for all authentication events and set up alerts for anomalies.

compliance_objective: Limit session duration to reduce exposure
evidence_requirement: Configuration showing max session time of 30 minutes
implementation_guidance: Configure application to enforce short session timeouts with automatic termination.
Conduct quarterly reviews of privileged access lists and remove unnecessary permissions.

evidence_requirement: Audit logs of access grants and revocations
implementation_guidance: Implement JIT provisioning with automatic revocation after task completion.

compliance_objective: Detect unusual patterns in system behavior
implementation_guidance: Deploy machine learning models to identify deviations from normal logging patterns.

evidence_requirement: Central log repository with retention policies
implementation_guidance: Implement centralized logging with automated retention and analysis capabilities.
Deploy zero trust architecture requiring verification for every access attempt.
Conduct regular security assessments and monitor vendor compliance with security standards.
